title: JNCASR Instrument Manager Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
org: Jawaharlal Nehru Centre For Advanced Scientific Research (JNCASR)
shortInfo: Jawaharlal Nehru Centre For Advanced Scientific Research (JNCASR) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 1 Instrument Manager Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for research jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their resume and documents to the official email address.

basic_details.job_title: JNCASR Instrument Manager Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Jawaharlal Nehru Centre For Advanced Scientific Research (JNCASR)
basic_details.short_information: Jawaharlal Nehru Centre For Advanced Scientific Research (JNCASR) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 1 Instrument Manager Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for research jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their resume and documents to the official email address.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. or equivalent degree in Chemistry/Physics or BE, BTech with minimum 60% marks.
qualification.details: M.Sc. or equivalent degree in the area of Chemistry/Physics or BE, BTech with minimum 60% marks. Prior hands-on experience in the operation and maintenance of Scanning electron microscopes (FESEM), ensuring optimal imaging performance and accurate analytical results. FESEM must be handled independently by the selected candidate.

salary_details.details: Rs. 35,000/- (without experience) Rs 40,700 (with experience), with possibility of higher remuneration.

selection_process: Shortlisted candidates may be invited for in person interview. Online interviews will be considered in special circumstances.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for JNCASR Instrument Manager Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 29-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the JNCASR Instrument Manager position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 29th May 2026. It is advisable to send your application well in advance of this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Instrument Manager role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Sc. or equivalent degree in Chemistry or Physics, or a BE/B.Tech degree with a minimum of 60% marks to be eligible for this position.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any experience required for this post?
faq.answer: While not strictly mandatory, prior hands-on experience in operating and maintaining Scanning Electron Microscopes (FESEM) is highly desirable. The selected candidate will be expected to handle FESEM independently.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Instrument Manager position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Instrument Manager post is 35 years. Specific age relaxations may apply as per government rules, though not detailed in this summary.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Instrument Manager role?
faq.answer: The consolidated remuneration offered is Rs. 35,000/- per month for candidates without experience and Rs. 40,700/- per month for those with relevant experience. Higher remuneration is possible based on experience.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for the Instrument Manager job at JNCASR?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to send a scanned copy of the duly filled application form along with testimonials and a brief resume to the specified email address.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The position of Instrument Manager at JNCASR is a temporary role. This means the appointment will be for a fixed duration as per the terms of the contract.

faq.question: Q8. What is the total number of vacancies for the Instrument Manager post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Instrument Manager position as per the official notification released by JNCASR. This is a single opening for eligible candidates.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates who are shortlisted based on their applications may be invited for an in-person interview. In special circumstances, online interviews might be considered.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and the application form template are available on the JNCASR website. You can also find direct links to these resources in the 'Important Links' section of this article.
